---
title: "<i>English Illustrated Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>English Illustrated Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was published monthly by Macmillan 1883-1913.  CMY published <i>The Armourer’s Prentices</i> in it in 1884.  She wrote to G. L. Craik (10 July 1884) protesting about the publication in it of Henry James’s ‘The Author of <i>Beltraffio</i>’on the grounds that it was calculated to ‘make sceptically inclined people averse from devout faith’.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
